title: Christine Korsgaard
body: Christine Marion Korsgaard,  (; born April 9, 1952) is an American philosopher who is the Arthur Kingsley Porter Professor of Philosophy Emerita at Harvard University. Her main scholarly interests are in moral philosophy and its history; the relation of issues in moral philosophy to issues in metaphysics, the philosophy of mind, and the theory of personal identity; the theory of personal relationships; and in normativity in general.
categories: Corresponding fellows of the British Academy
Harvard University Department of Philosophy faculty
Presidents of the American Philosophical Association
